summary: Comprehensive testing of new features: Occupancy Entry (occupied_beds), CM Performance page, Properties CM column/modal, Change Password modal, Rogan user, backend APIs. All 10 backend tests pass. All frontend features verified.
critical_code_review_comments: Properties.js PUT /api/properties/{id}/cluster-manager uses body key 'cluster_manager_id' in frontend but backend endpoint at line 579 of server.py may use a different field name — tested and works correctly via backend test
ClusterPerformance.js shows 'No Cluster Managers' when no CMs have assigned properties — this is expected, shows 'Test' CM with 0 properties (from test data) which is correct
seed_data_creation: Changed rogan@yube1.in password to Qwerty@123Temp and reverted back to Qwerty@123 during test
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features work: (1) Occupancy Entry accepts occupied_beds, live % calc, Set All Full, placeholder 0-N. (2) CM Performance page /performance/cluster-managers shows lifetime + monthly with month/year dropdowns. (3) Properties CLUSTER MGR column present, edit modal has Cluster Manager section with dropdown + Save Cluster Manager button. (4) Change Password modal works - wrong pwd shows error toast, correct pwd changes successfully. (5) Both dharun@yube1.in/Qwerty@789 and rogan@yube1.in/Qwerty@123 login as admin. Backend APIs: GET/POST occupancy bulk, GET cluster-managers lifetime/monthly, PUT auth/change-password all working.
